title: Fruit and Vegetables Aid Scheme: annual report for 2024
body: "During the period 1 January – 31 December 2024, Producer Organisations (POs) received funding of £41,628,449.15. There were 32 active POs in the scheme.  All POs were subjected to a 100% administrative check and 13 POs were subjected to risk-based on the spot checks.  As a result, claims for aid were reduced by £697,508.76 and administrative penalties amounting to £47,187.83 applied. "

taxons.title: Import, export and distribution of food
